results.rendered_html:
adhimāṃsa (1. adhi + māṃsa) m. hypertrophia carnis ( HESSLER ).
1〉 eine Krankheit des Weissen im Auge  SUŚR. 2,310,9 . vistīrṇaṃ mṛdu bahulaṃ yakṛtprakāśaṃ [Page1-0151] śyāvaṃ vā tadadhikamāṃsajārma vidyāt 15 .  WISE : pterygium.
— 2〉 = adhimāṃsaka  SUŚR. 1,303,10 . 2,127,6 .
